cc_addr: n_a_placeholder
subject: Re: Willamette Kendo — 10 fighters confirmed for Oct 17
body:
Haruki-sensei,

Great to hear. For parking, use the east lot off Cedar Ridge Plaza — I'll have cones reserving 4 spots marked 'Visiting Clubs.' Unloading zone is at the side entrance.

Check-in opens at 7:15 AM. Have your roster printout and any outstanding waivers ready at the registration table.

Ossu,
Aaron

cc_addr: n_a_placeholder
subject: Fall Tournament — Judge Schedule & Run-of-Show Overview
body:
Team,

Here's the high-level run-of-show for Oct 17. Full document coming by Oct 15.

7:00 AM — Venue open, setup
7:15 AM — Check-in / weigh-in (judo)
8:30 AM — Opening ceremony
9:00 AM — Kids divisions begin
10:30 AM — Youth divisions
12:00 PM — Lunch break
1:00 PM — Adult Kyu divisions
3:00 PM — Adult Dan divisions + Judo Open
5:00 PM — Awards ceremony
5:30 PM — Teardown

Judge assignments attached. Kenji — let me know ASAP about your knee status for the Dan bracket.

— Aaron
